lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and damaged. It requires major mechanical repairs to be fully operational.
Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require mechanical attention.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows the expected signs of regular use over the years. The exterior paint has begun to fade on the roof and hood, and there are several noticeable scratches and small dings around the body panels. Inside, the interior is intact but shows wear, particularly on the driver’s seat bolsters and the floor mats. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives fine, though it would benefit from a tune-up and new tires in the near future. It’s a reliable choice for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Get ready for a fantastic deal on a vehicle that's ready to hit the road! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey through life, but it remains a dependable and spirited performer. It’s the perfect choice for someone looking for a solid, functional ride at an incredible price!

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents a rare opportunity to own a car that has been kept in showroom-quality state. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, original luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the interior is immaculate, with the upholstery and trim showing virtually no signs of use; all features, from the climate control to the premium sound system, operate perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak condition, benefiting from meticulous maintenance and regular servicing. The engine performs flawlessly, and the ride is exceptionally smooth and quiet. This is a top-tier example that looks, feels, and drives like new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained in a state that can only be described as pristine. This vehicle exhibits a level of preservation that rivals its original showroom debut, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains entirely unblemished. Meticulously serviced and clinically clean, it represents an uncompromising opportunity for the most discerning automotive enthusiast. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who prioritize absolute quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it shows in every single detail. It's in absolutely pristine, flawless condition inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a concours-level E46 M3, a benchmark in naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine, boasting a high-compression ratio and six individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. The double-VANOS system has been meticulously maintained, ensuring optimal valve timing across the power band. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual Getrag transmission to a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis remains
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating—absolutely no chips, swirls, or imperfections to be found. Step inside to an interior that remains in untouched condition; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear, and the cabin still retains that distinctive new-car aroma. Every button, screen, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a comprehensive, open-check

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits impeccable aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity, reflective of its fastidious maintenance history and climate-controlled storage. With an unblemished exterior and a cabin that retains its original showroom luster, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original factory specifications. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to superior preservation and unrivaled quality.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute beauty! It’s in seriously incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as pampered. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically flawless, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Professional detailing complete.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that highlights its flawless, mirror-finish paint. There are absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. The interior is equally pristine; the premium hand-stitched leather remains supple with no bolster wear, and the cabin still retains its original factory scent. Every technological feature, from the advanced driver-assist suite to the premium surround-sound system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule at authorized service centers. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of being a non-smoker, pet-free vehicle, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to own a 'time-capsule' example of this model. It drives as smoothly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in an immaculate, showroom-fresh state, reflecting a standard of preservation that is exceedingly rare. Every surface and mechanical component has been maintained to the highest degree of excellence, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is an acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, offered in truly pristine condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its original showroom luster and mechanical integrity. For the individual who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance, this offering represents an unrivaled opportunity in the current market.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly spectacular shape—honestly, it feels just like it did the day it left the showroom! I’ve babied it from day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve gotta see it to believe how pristine it is!

This E46 M3 is an exceptional specimen of the S54-powered legend. Featuring the high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS, the power delivery is linear and surgical. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp engagement, distributing torque through a factory limited-slip differential. This chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension geometry remains taut with zero bushing deflection, and the rod bearings have been serviced for total mechanical peace of mind. Every body panel maintains factory tolerances and original paint depth, representing a true collector-grade driving machine.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Full service records included.

This showroom-quality vehicle is the pinnacle of automotive preservation. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a recent ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine, factory-fresh condition—completely free of wear, odors, or blemishes on the premium leather upholstery. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history and exceptionally low mileage. Every button, dial, and stitch reflects the care of a dedicated owner who kept it garaged and climate-controlled. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks. Turn-key and ready for its next enthusiast.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Both aesthetic and mechanical states are beyond reproach, catering to the requirements of the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of such uncompromising caliber and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and it is a total dream! This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. I've been super meticulous about keeping it clean and well-maintained, and it really shows. It’s spotless inside and out, runs perfectly, and is just waiting for its next adventure. You’re going to absolutely love how it feels on the road. Come check it out!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, meticulously preserved to maintain its factory-spec performance. This example features the S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for a razor-sharp throttle response. The chassis is structurally pristine with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers and poly-bushes for neutralized body roll. The Getrag six-speed manual gearbox provides precise gate engagement, feeding power through a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. Every mechanical component has been scrutinized, including recent rod bearing replacement and valve clearance adjustments. The exterior retains its original deep luster with no paint depth inconsistencies, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or dash delamination. A true turn-key specimen for the
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. All service records available. Clean title. No accidents.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved. Finished in a deep, mirror-like Obsidian Black, the exterior is absolutely flawless, having benefited from a professional ceramic coating and climate-controlled garage storage since day one. There are zero stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-delivered' condition; the premium Nappa leather retains its matte factory finish and original scent, with no creasing on the bolsters or wear on the touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the high-fidelity sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive dealership service history and a recently fitted set of Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. Included are both original keys, all owner’s manuals, and a thick binder of maintenance records. This is a time capsule for the discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, boasting flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical performance. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector.
